name: Fresh Start Advancement
description_short: Fresh Start Advancement is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 5.0/5 with 78 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Fresh Start Advancement is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 78 reviews, Fresh Start Advancement has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Fresh Start Advancement specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Fresh Start Advancement operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Fresh Start Advancement should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
